builds.name: 创生主C输出流
builds.description: 以暴击和攻击力为核心的创生反应主C Build，搭配九原聚怪+早雾增伤
builds.descriptionEn: Crit and ATK-focused Genesis reaction DPS build, paired with Jiuyuan grouping and Hotori buffs
builds.notes: 娜娜莉创生队核心，九原聚怪+早雾增伤+主角即瞬环合。0觉无治疗，九原1觉补奶。
builds.notesEn: Nanally Genesis team core. Jiuyuan groups, Hotori buffs, Protagonist instant Ring Fusion. No healing at 0-awaken, Jiuyuan 1-awaken adds heal.

builds.name: 增益支援流
builds.description: 以生命和充能为核心的支援 Build，搭配任意输出角色
builds.descriptionEn: HP and energy-focused support, pairs with any DPS character
builds.notes: 核心增益辅助，搭配任意输出角色均可。灵属性共鸣提供稳定增益。
builds.notesEn: Core buff support, works with any DPS. Anima resonance provides consistent buffs.

builds.name: 攻防一体
builds.description: 平衡攻击和防御的 Build，兼顾输出和生存能力
builds.descriptionEn: Balanced build that maintains both offensive and defensive capabilities
builds.notes: 法蒂亚自带护盾，可以走更激进的输出路线
builds.notesEn: Fadia has built-in shields, allowing a more aggressive playstyle

builds.name: 召唤输出
builds.description: 以异能攻击加成为核心的召唤流 Build
builds.descriptionEn: Esper ATK-focused summon DPS build
builds.notes: 拉克莉莫萨的构装体可以同时攻击多个目标，适合群体战斗
builds.notesEn: Lacrimosa's constructs attack multiple targets simultaneously, great for AoE

builds.name: 浊燃输出流
builds.description: 以暴击为核心的浊燃反应主C Build，搭配达芙蒂尔触发浊燃
builds.descriptionEn: Crit-focused Blaze reaction DPS build, paired with Daffodil for Blaze trigger
builds.notes: 白藏浊燃队核心，刚需达芙蒂尔触发浊燃。注意1.1版本安魂曲可能上位替代。
builds.notesEn: Baicang Blaze team core, requires Daffodil for Blaze trigger. Requiem in v1.1 may powercreep.

builds.name: 剑术输出
builds.description: 以暴击为核心的剑术输出 Build
builds.descriptionEn: Crit-focused sword DPS build
builds.notes: 零的剑术连击流畅，适合追求高输出的玩家
builds.notesEn: Zero's sword combos are fluid, suited for players who maximize damage output

builds.name: 聚怪增伤辅助流
builds.description: 以生命和充能为核心的唯一S级辅助 Build，聚怪+加攻，1觉拐力翻倍
builds.descriptionEn: HP and energy-focused only S-rank support, grouping + ATK buff, 1-awaken doubles buff power
builds.notes: 唯一S级辅助，兼顾聚怪+加攻。1觉质变拐力翻倍，常驻S兑换优先级仅次于九原。
builds.notesEn: Only S-rank support with grouping + ATK buff. 1-awaken doubles buff, second priority after Jiuyuan for standard S pick.

builds.name: 浊燃反应副C流
builds.description: 以攻击和暴击为核心的高频振刀Boss特化输出 Build
builds.descriptionEn: ATK and Crit-focused high-frequency parry boss specialist sub-DPS
builds.notes: 白藏队刚需副C，高频振刀Boss特化。浊燃反应触发位，不可替代。
builds.notesEn: Required for Baicang team, high-frequency parry boss specialist. Blaze reaction trigger, irreplaceable.

builds.name: 聚怪奶妈辅助流
builds.description: 以生命和充能为核心的聚怪+治疗辅助 Build，1觉解锁奶妈能力
builds.descriptionEn: HP and energy-focused grouping + healing support, unlocks healer role at 1-awaken
builds.notes: 常驻S首选自选，超大范围聚怪泛用性顶级。1觉质变可客串奶妈，几乎所有队伍都能就业。
builds.notesEn: Best standard S pick, huge AoE grouping with top versatility. 1-awaken adds healing, fits almost every team.

builds.name: 刃翼输出
builds.description: 以暴击和攻击为核心的飞行输出 Build
builds.descriptionEn: Crit and ATK-focused flying DPS build
builds.notes: 哈索尔的刃翼兼具飞行和攻击能力，机动性极强
builds.notesEn: Hathor's blade wings combine flight and offense, offering extreme mobility

builds.name: 重击输出
builds.description: 以暴击伤害和攻击为核心的妖锤重击 Build
builds.descriptionEn: Crit DMG and ATK-focused heavy strike build
builds.notes: 赤子的妖锤攻击范围广，适合群体战斗和 BOSS 战
builds.notesEn: Chiz's yokai hammer has wide attack range, great for both AoE and boss fights

builds.name: 护盾生存流
builds.description: 以生命和防御为核心的1.0最佳生存位 Build，护盾+减攻+属性抗性
builds.descriptionEn: HP and DEF-focused best 1.0 survival slot, shield + ATK reduction + elemental resist
builds.notes: 1.0最佳生存位，护盾+减攻+属性抗性+倾陷效率。咒队额外10%增伤。
builds.notesEn: Best 1.0 survival, shield + ATK reduction + resist + break efficiency. Extra 10% DMG for Incantation teams.

builds.name: 影袭输出
builds.description: 以暴击和速度为核心的暗影突袭 Build
builds.descriptionEn: Crit and speed-focused shadow strike build
builds.notes: 翳擅长从暗处发起攻击，速度词条提升先手优势
builds.notesEn: Skia excels at attacking from darkness, speed substats improve first-strike advantage

builds.name: 双刃支援
builds.description: 以生命和速度为核心的快速支援 Build
builds.descriptionEn: HP and speed-focused quick support build
builds.notes: 薄荷攻速极快，可以快速提供支援效果
builds.notesEn: Mint's fast attack speed enables quick support effect application

builds.name: 构装支援
builds.description: 以生命和防御为核心的构装体支援 Build
builds.descriptionEn: HP and DEF-focused construct support build
builds.notes: 泰格多的构装体兼具攻击和支援能力
builds.notesEn: Taygedo's constructs offer both offensive and support capabilities

builds.name: 盈蓄主C输出流
builds.description: 以暴击和攻击为核心的盈蓄反应主C Build，都市大亨免费满配6+5
builds.descriptionEn: Crit and ATK-focused Accumulation reaction DPS, free 6+5 from City Tycoon
builds.notes: 都市大亨免费6+5满配，满配后强度超过所有主C。搭配九原+哈索尔触发盈蓄反应。
builds.notesEn: Free 6+5 from City Tycoon, outperforms all DPS at max investment. Pair with Jiuyuan + Hathor for Accumulation reaction.

builds.name: 加攻拐辅助流
builds.description: 以生命和速度为核心的A级战神辅助 Build，满觉12%暴伤加成
builds.descriptionEn: HP and Speed-focused A-rank powerhouse support, 12% crit DMG at max awaken
builds.notes: A级战神，开服送一只。满觉后12%暴伤加成，二队必练的泛用拐。
builds.notesEn: A-rank powerhouse, given free at launch. 12% crit DMG at max awaken, must-build for second team.

builds.name: 暗属性主C输出流
builds.description: 利用浊燃反应的暗属性主C，搭配翳触发黯星爆发
builds.descriptionEn: Dark attribute DPS leveraging Turbid Burn reactions, paired with Skia for Dark Star bursts
builds.notes: 浊燃队核心输出，翳提供浊燃前置，阿德勒破盾触发失谐。0觉即可胜任主C。
builds.notesEn: Turbid Burn team core DPS. Skia provides Turbid Burn setup, Adler breaks shields for Disharmony. Viable at 0-awaken.

builds.name: 混沌属性速切输出
builds.description: 高频切换触发连携技的混沌属性速切输出
builds.descriptionEn: Chaos attribute quick-swap DPS triggering chain attacks on character switch
builds.notes: 速切队核心，利用切换角色触发连携技打出高频伤害。需要高充能保证循环。
builds.notesEn: Quick-swap team core. Uses character switch chain attacks for high-frequency damage. Needs high Energy Regen for rotation.

builds.name: 物理格斗爆发流
builds.description: 以蓄力重击为核心的高爆发物理输出
builds.descriptionEn: High-burst physical DPS focused on charged heavy attacks
builds.notes: 蓄力重击伤害极高但需要安全输出环境，白藏提供护盾+薄荷治疗保生存。适合有一定操作基础的玩家。
builds.notesEn: Charged attacks deal massive damage but need safe windows. Baicang shields + Mint healing for survivability. Best for players comfortable with mechanics.

builds.name: 灼烧反应主C流
builds.description: 炽焰之心套装核心灼烧主C，搭配创生/浊燃反应提升伤害
builds.descriptionEn: Blazing Heart set core DPS using burn reactions with Genesis/Turbid Burn synergy
builds.notes: 灼烧队核心输出，炽焰之心4件套配合必杀技暴击率加成。九原聚怪+哈尼尔增伤打出高额AOE。
builds.notesEn: Burn team core DPS. Blazing Heart 4pc + ultimate Crit Rate bonus. Jiuyuan groups + Haniel ATK buff for massive AOE.

builds.name: 狂战士暴击流
builds.description: 利用狂战士之怒套装的暴击机制打出高频暴击
builds.descriptionEn: High Crit frequency build using Berserker's Fury set mechanics
builds.notes: 狂战士之怒4件套核心使用者，暴击率50%以下获得额外暴击率加成，50%以上获得暴击伤害加成，无论哪种都强力。
builds.notesEn: Core user of Berserker's Fury 4pc. Below 50% Crit Rate gains extra rate, above 50% gains extra Crit DMG. Strong either way.

builds.name: 裂空高速输出流
builds.description: 利用裂空之牙套装的属性反应增伤打出高频属性伤害
builds.descriptionEn: High-frequency elemental damage using Skyrending Fang reaction bonus
builds.notes: 裂空之牙4件套反应增伤核心，搭配零和达芙迪尔触发高频属性反应。建议保证暴击率60%以上。
builds.notesEn: Skyrending Fang 4pc reaction bonus core. Paired with Zero and Daffodil for high-frequency reactions. Aim for 60%+ Crit Rate.

builds.name: 裂空反应输出流
builds.description: 裂空之牙反应增伤的通用属性输出角色
builds.descriptionEn: General elemental DPS using Skyrending Fang reaction damage bonus
builds.notes: 通用输出角色，裂空之牙4件套配合属性反应增伤。翳提供浊燃前置，薄荷保证生存。适合作为副C使用。
builds.notesEn: Versatile DPS with Skyrending Fang 4pc reaction bonus. Skia provides Turbid Burn setup, Mint for sustain. Good as sub-DPS.

builds.name: 回响充能辅助流
builds.description: 利用回响之潮的充能加成为全队提供能量回复
builds.descriptionEn: Energy support using Resonance Tide set to provide team-wide energy regen
builds.notes: 回响之潮4件套核心辅助，施放必杀技后全队回复15能量。搭配高能量消耗的主C（如娜娜莉）效果最佳。
builds.notesEn: Core Resonance Tide 4pc support. Ultimate restores 15 Energy to full team. Best with high-cost ult characters like Nanally.

builds.name: 增益辅助流
builds.description: 以生命和充能为核心的A级增益辅助，为队伍提供攻防增益
builds.descriptionEn: HP and Energy-focused A-rank buffer support, providing ATK and DEF buffs to the team
builds.notes: A级泛用增益辅助，低配替代早雾的聚怪增伤位。搭配任意主C均可，适合二队。
builds.notesEn: Versatile A-rank buffer, budget substitute for Hotori's grouping+buff slot. Works with any DPS, good for second team.

builds.name: 能量回复辅助流
builds.description: 以充能效率为核心的能量回复辅助，加速队伍必杀技循环
builds.descriptionEn: Energy Regen-focused support that accelerates team ultimate rotation
builds.notes: A级能量辅助，加速白藏浊燃队必杀技循环。搭配高能量消耗主C效果最佳。
builds.notesEn: A-rank energy support, speeds up Baicang Blaze team ultimate rotation. Best with high-cost ult DPS.

builds.name: 创生输出流
builds.description: 以暴击为核心的创生属性A级输出，适合作为二队主C
builds.descriptionEn: Crit-focused Genesis attribute A-rank DPS, good as second team carry
builds.notes: A级创生输出，作为娜娜莉的下位替代。搭配九原聚怪+哈尼尔增伤可胜任日常内容。
builds.notesEn: A-rank Genesis DPS, budget alternative to Nanally. Paired with Jiuyuan grouping + Haniel buffs for daily content.

builds.name: 混沌属性输出流
builds.description: 以暴击伤害为核心的混沌属性输出，利用负面状态增伤
builds.descriptionEn: Crit DMG-focused Chaos attribute DPS, leveraging debuff bonuses
builds.notes: 混沌属性A级输出，依赖负面状态触发增伤。翳提供控制，阿德勒提供护盾保生存。
builds.notesEn: Chaos A-rank DPS, relies on debuffs for damage bonus. Skia provides CC, Adler provides shields.

builds.name: 近远切换输出流
builds.description: 以鞭剑远近切换为核心的高速输出，攻速极快
builds.descriptionEn: High-speed DPS using whip-sword range switching, extremely fast attacks
builds.notes: A级近远切换输出，攻速快连击流畅。咲里增益+薄荷治疗保证输出环境。
builds.notesEn: A-rank mid-range DPS with fluid combos. Sakiri buffs + Mint healing for safe damage windows.

builds.name: 混沌辅助流
builds.description: 以生命和效果命中为核心的混沌属性辅助，施加负面状态
builds.descriptionEn: HP and Effect Hit-focused Chaos support, applying debuffs to enemies
builds.notes: A级混沌辅助，负面状态施加手。搭配黑鸟或阿尔法德触发混沌系增伤。
builds.notesEn: A-rank Chaos support, debuff applicator. Pair with Black Bird or Alphard for Chaos synergy.

builds.name: 血刃献祭输出流
builds.description: 以暴击为核心的血量献祭型高爆发输出，低血量时伤害翻倍
builds.descriptionEn: Crit-focused HP-sacrifice burst DPS, damage doubles at low HP
builds.notes: A级血刃献祭输出，低血量时伤害极高但需要护盾/治疗保护。阿德勒护盾+薄荷治疗是刚需。
builds.notesEn: A-rank blood sacrifice DPS, massive damage at low HP but needs protection. Adler shield + Mint healing required.

builds.name: 念力屏障辅助流
builds.description: 以生命和防御为核心的治疗护盾辅助，低配替代阿德勒
builds.descriptionEn: HP and DEF-focused healing/shield support, budget alternative to Adler
builds.notes: A级护盾辅助，阿德勒的低配替代。提供念力屏障和治疗，适合二队生存位。
builds.notesEn: A-rank shield support, budget alternative to Adler. Provides psychic barriers and healing, good for second team survival.

builds.name: 重力嘲讽坦克流
builds.description: 以生命和防御为核心的嘲讽坦，吸引敌人火力保护队友
builds.descriptionEn: HP and DEF-focused taunt tank, drawing enemy fire to protect allies
builds.notes: A级嘲讽坦克，重力锤产生引力吸引敌人。搭配拉克莉莫萨AOE输出效果极佳。
builds.notesEn: A-rank taunt tank, gravity hammer draws enemies in. Excellent pairing with Lacrimosa for AoE damage.

builds.name: 风系加速辅助流
builds.description: 以速度和充能为核心的加速辅助，提升全队行动速度
builds.descriptionEn: Speed and Energy Regen-focused buffer, increasing team action speed
builds.notes: A级风系加速辅助，提升全队速度加快输出循环。适合追求快速清图的队伍。
builds.notesEn: A-rank wind speed buffer, accelerates team output cycle. Great for fast clear teams.

builds.name: 减防辅助流
builds.description: 以效果命中和速度为核心的减防辅助，降低敌人防御提升队伍输出
builds.descriptionEn: Effect Hit and Speed-focused DEF reduction support, lowering enemy DEF for more team damage
builds.notes: A级减防辅助，降低敌人防御提升全队输出。搭配高倍率主C效果最好。
builds.notesEn: A-rank DEF reduction support, boosting team damage by lowering enemy DEF. Best paired with high-multiplier DPS.

builds.name: 物理输出流
builds.description: 以暴击和攻击为核心的物理A级输出，稳定可靠
builds.descriptionEn: Crit and ATK-focused physical A-rank DPS, reliable and consistent
builds.notes: A级物理输出，不依赖元素反应的伤害稳定。适合应对元素抗性高的敌人。
builds.notesEn: A-rank physical DPS, stable damage independent of elemental reactions. Good against high elemental resist enemies.

builds.name: 水属性输出流
builds.description: 以暴击和属性伤害为核心的水属性A级输出
builds.descriptionEn: Crit and Elemental DMG-focused Water attribute A-rank DPS
builds.notes: A级水属性输出，冰扇减速+风花加速形成速度差控制。搭配希尔菲充能加速循环。
builds.notesEn: A-rank Water DPS, Frost Fan slow + Fuuka speed creates tempo control. Paired with Sylphy for energy acceleration.

builds.name: 全能辅助流
builds.description: 以生命和速度为核心的A级全能辅助，兼顾治疗和增益
builds.descriptionEn: HP and Speed-focused A-rank all-round support, combining healing and buffs
builds.notes: A级全能辅助，镜盾反射+治疗+增益三合一。适合需要多功能辅助的队伍。
builds.notesEn: A-rank all-round support, mirror shield reflection + healing + buffs in one. Great for teams needing multifunctional support.
